title: Grilled Crusty Fish Pilaf
description: A salty and flaky one-pot Syrian dish featuring Worcestershire sauce, grilled fish, and high-protein-friendly options.

ingredients.name: Wheat Berries (or other whole grain pasta)

instructions: Soak wheat berries in water for at least 30 minutes. Drain and rinse, then add back into the pot with 2 cups of fresh water.
Stir in Worcestershire sauce, salt, pepper, olive oil, garlic, onion, and basil leaves. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer until grains are tender, about 45 minutes.
While wheat berries are cooking, season the fish with salt and black pepper inside and out.
Arrange seasoned fish on the preheated grill and cook for about 6-8 minutes per side or until cooked through. Remove from heat and let rest for a few minutes.
Once grains are tender, fold in chopped grilled fish into the pilaf mixture and serve.
